description: lib.rs:40-42 — pub struct FileBackend { path: PathBuf } has no derives. PathBuf is itself Debug, so #[derive(Debug)] is trivial. Without Debug, the type cannot be ?-printed in user code or test fixtures, and an Arc<dyn SecretStore> downcast for inspection is awkward. Same finding as crate-secretsx-ojwd (AwsKmsBackend) and y4xz.10 (DesktopKeyringBackend); apply the consistent pattern across the workspace.
title: FileBackend lacks Debug derive
